full_description: The Task Planner app helps users organize and manage their tasks, providing a simple and intuitive way to prioritize and schedule their work. It includes features for setting deadlines and reminders, as well as tracking progress and completing tasks. With Task Planner, you can stay on top of your to-do list and achieve your goals more efficiently. The app is designed to be user-friendly and easy to navigate, making it accessible to anyone looking to improve their productivity.
